title: Yapay Zeka Destekli Senior Full Stack Engineer
company: Adorel Lojistik Kargo Telekomünikasyon Yazılım İç ve Dış Ticaret A.Ş
description: AdorelGo Hakkında AdorelGo; fulfillment, stok yönetimi, sipariş operasyonları, kargo yönetimi, ön muhasebe, e-fatura ve ödeme süreçlerini tek panelde birleştiren yeni nesil SaaS operasyon platformudur. Fulfillment çalışmamızla ile başlayan altyapımız; ilerleyen süreçte çoklu depo, yurtdışı fulfillment, global operasyon ve modüler SaaS sistemine dönüşecek şekilde geliştirilmektedir. Şu anda yüksek ölçeklenebilir mimariyle çalışan; Laravel, React, PostgreSQL ve AI-assisted development odaklı güçlü bir teknoloji ekibi kuruyoruz. Aradığımız Profil Yapay zekayı aktif kullanan, hızlı geliştirme yapabilen, sistem mimarisi düşünebilen güçlü bir Senior Full Stack geliştirici arıyoruz. Özellikle aşağıdaki konularda deneyimli adaylar önceliklidir: Claude Opus 4.7 Sonnet 4.6 Cursor AI Composer 2.5 AI-assisted coding workflow SaaS mimarisi API-first yaklaşım Büyük ölçekli sistem mantığı Sadece kod yazan değil; sistem kurabilen, mimari düşünebilen, AI ile hızlı geliştirme yapabilen, performans optimizasyonu bilen, modern yazılım geliştirme süreçlerine hakim geliştiriciler arıyoruz. Başvuru Lütfen aşağıdakileri paylaşın: GitHub profiliniz Daha önce geliştirdiğiniz projeler AI workflow deneyiminiz Aktif kullandığınız AI araçları Laravel / React tecrübeniz SaaS proje deneyiminiz Özellikle: Claude Opus deneyiminizi Cursor AI kullanım seviyenizi Büyük sistem mimarisi deneyimlerinizi API entegrasyon tecrübelerinizi belirtmenizi rica ederiz.

title: Backend Engineer, TURKEY
description: About nsave nsave is a fintech company headquartered in London. Founded by Amer Baroudi and Abdallah AbuHashem, our vision is to "Protect and grow the wealth of the financially excluded". We have built a global platform that provide trusted USD accounts, global payments, and investments for individuals from distressed economies, where inflation is high and banking systems are unstable. Our compliance-by-design approach and proprietary technology allow us to deliver these services securely and at scale. To date, nsave has raised $22M from leading investors including Sequoia Capital, TQ Ventures, Y Combinator, and SV Angel. Our team has grown 200% in the last year, and with so much more ahead, we're just getting started! Learn more at www.nsave.com . 📍 Location: Turkey 🧾 Engagement Type: Independent Contractor About the Role As our Backend Engineer , you will build and scale the infrastructure powering nsave's financial services. Working closely with the CTO and engineering team, you'll own critical backend subsystems — from service architecture and reliability to security and compliance integrations — serving tens of thousands of users across multiple jurisdictions. Who You Are Strong engineering fundamentals: You build and optimise software systems with solid knowledge of clean architecture, layered abstractions, and complexity tradeoffs Broad platform knowledge: You're comfortable across backend architecture, databases, site reliability, infrastructure as code, and CI/CD Security-minded: You can design and manage robust financial systems with high security and compliance requirements Business-oriented: Your technical decisions are informed by product and business context, and you know how to balance speed with quality How You'll Make a Difference Design, implement, and own critical infrastructure — including service architecture, reliability, build and release, and integration with compliance and banking services Proactively improve system health by identifying weak spots in the codebase and infrastructure, and prioritising fixes Collaborate with engineering, product, and operations teams to ship features across multiple markets Contribute to engineering best practices, code quality, and process improvements as we scale What We're Looking For Experience in backend engineering, platform engineering, or infrastructure roles Proficiency in backend languages and frameworks relevant to scalable financial systems Ability to operate independently and execute in fast-moving environments Experience in startups, fintech, or regulated environments is strongly preferred nsave Values Alongside professional excellence, we look for people whose values align with ours: Service — "Mission First": We put the mission, our customers, and our team above self. Urgency — "Stay focused. Move fast": We act with urgency and intention, concentrating on what matters most. Ownership — "Act as an Owner": We take responsibility for outcomes end-to-end. Standards — "Pursue Excellence": We hold ourselves to high personal standards and continuously improve. Please apply only if you: Are deeply motivated by nsave's mission and the problems we are solving Thrive in high-ownership, high-accountability environments Are comfortable operating with urgency and ambiguity Want to build from first principles in an early-stage, high-growth company Contractor Classification Notice This role is offered on a freelance / independent contractor basis. Contractors are not employees of nsave and are responsible for their own taxes, insurance, and statutory obligations. nsave is an equal opportunity organisation. We welcome applications from all backgrounds and do not discriminate on the basis of age, gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other protected characteristic.

title: Senior Full Stack React Native Developer
description: As Blueclip , we started our journey to bring the most creative minds and the know-how together to deliver great works. About Our Search We are currently looking for an experienced Full-Stack React Native Developer to join one of our clients — a growing app studio focused on building and scaling high-quality mobile applications. We are looking for a developer who can take ownership of features end-to-end, contribute to building, maintaining, and shipping the consumer mobile apps. The developer will work across multiple apps simultaneously; fixing bugs, handling maintenance on both mobile and backend, setting up new apps from scratch, and taking active part in their development. While the primary focus of the role is React Native mobile development , solid experience with JavaScript-based backend frameworks is essential, as the role also involves building and maintaining backend APIs. Role Overview As a hands-on Full-Stack Mobile Developer , you will work across the full lifecycle of mobile applications, owning features end-to-end from backend API to deployed app on the stores. Key Responsibilities Working across several consumer apps in parallel Bug fixes and ongoing maintenance on both the mobile and backend side Setting up the architecture and codebase for new apps Contributing to feature development from concept to release Qualifications Strong proficiency in React Native (both CLI and Expo) Strong proficiency in TypeScript Experience with Zustand, React Query, and MMKV Experience implementing push notifications and deep linking (FCM, APNs, universal links) Experience with in-app purchase and subscription flows (RevenueCat or native IAP) Solid backend experience with NestJS, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Firebase Auth Hands-on experience with Google Cloud , including server and database management (Cloud Run, Cloud SQL, Secret Manager) Experience setting up and managing CI/CD pipelines using EAS Build and/or Fastlane Hands-on experience publishing and managing apps on the App Store and Google Play Store; including TestFlight, internal testing tracks, store listings, and handling review rejections (essential, as all our apps are released through these channels) Proficiency with Git and GitHub Ability to translate designs from Figma (or similar tools) into production-ready interfaces *Familiarity with all of the technologies listed above is required Nice to Have Experience with Sentry or Crashlytics for crash monitoring Experience integrating analytics tools such as Adjust and Firebase Experience with OTA updates (EAS Update or CodePush) Testing experience with Jest, Detox, or Maestro Ready to build and scale high-quality mobile applications? Apply now! 🚀

title: Senior Frontend Developer (Vue.js)
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. 🙂 Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer to join one of our high-growth client teams as a core frontend architect. In this role, you will lead the evolution of the client's user interfaces, moving beyond simple feature delivery to build highly performant, accessible, and scalable web applications. You will be the technical anchor for the frontend team, ensuring that the application architecture leverages the full power of modern Vue. Your focus will be on creating predictable state patterns, optimizing bundle sizes, and establishing a robust component library that elevates the user experience. This is a role for an engineer who views the frontend as a critical, enterprise-grade software system. What we are looking for: 5+ years of dedicated frontend experience, with deep, hands-on mastery of Vue 3 (Composition API) and its reactivity model. Strong experience writing clean, type-safe code within large-scale Vue applications. Advanced knowledge of Pinia (or highly structured Vuex architectures) for managing complex, asynchronous global states. Deep familiarity with modern build chains, specifically Vite, including configuration, code-splitting strategies, and dependency optimization. Experience implementing responsive UI using Tailwind CSS, CSS Modules, or advanced SASS/SCSS, matching exact design specs from Figma. Experience establishing frontend testing strategies using Vitest, Vue Test Utils, or End-to-End frameworks like Playwright/Cypress. Proven track record of optimizing Core Web Vitals, managing lazy loading, and diagnosing rendering bottlenecks. Located in CET timezone (+/- 3 hours), we are unable to consider applications from candidates in other time zones. Nice-to-have: Production experience with Server-Side Rendering (SSR) via Nuxt.js. Familiarity with Micro-Frontend architectures and module federation. Deep understanding of web accessibility standards (WCAG 2.1 AA) and semantic HTML. Experience with automated CI/CD deployment pipelines for frontend assets. Responsibilities: Architect and implement complex, interactive user interfaces from scratch using Vue 3 and TypeScript. Design and maintain a highly reusable, documented component library to unify the product ecosystem. Audit and refactor existing codebases to maximize application speed, responsiveness, and SEO health. Lead architectural decisions, establish linting/formatting standards, and conduct strict, constructive code reviews. Partner closely with Product Owners, UX/UI Designers, and Backend Engineers to define explicit API contracts and user flows. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities, just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.
